name: Tool Center Point (TCP) Calibration Check
description:
A robotics engineer has just installed a new end-effector tool on a UR5-style robot arm. Validate the Tool Center Point (TCP) definition by performing a calibration check across at least 12 distinct wrist orientations while holding a single nominal TCP position. Export the positional scatter statistics to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/ as:

1. tcp_scatter.csv: containing config_id, j0_deg through j5_deg (joint angles in degrees), measured_x, measured_y, measured_z, and deviation_from_mean_mm.
2. tcp_report.json: containing total_orientations, mean_x, mean_y, mean_z, std_x_mm, std_y_mm, std_z_mm, max_deviation_mm, and scatter_sphere_radius_mm.

Login: username=ga, password=password123.
